PowerShell(cd "D:\\GitHub\\CLB-Teaching-Desktop"; $pkg = Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $saved = $pkg.main; $pkg.main = "test-main.js"; $pkg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Out-File package.json -Encoding utf8; $p = Start-Process ".\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" "." -RedirectStandardError e.txt -Wait -PassThru; Get-Content e.txt; $pkg.main = $saved; $pkg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Out-File package.json -Encoding utf8; Remove-Item e.txt,test-main.js -EA SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd "D:\\GitHub\\CLB-Teaching-Desktop"; $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE = $null; $p = Start-Process ".\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "." -RedirectStandardError "e.txt" -PassThru; Start-Sleep 4; if \($p.HasExited\) { Write-Host "Exited: $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content e.txt -EA SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Host "Running \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)"; $p.Kill\(\) }; Remove-Item e.txt -EA SilentlyContinue)
